title: Custom Web Applications | SaaS Platforms | Web Apps
subtitle: Full-Stack Development — React & Node.js
description: Dashboards, booking systems, SaaS platforms, internal tools — if you can imagine it, we build it. Full-stack React & Node.js, 100% custom, zero off-the-shelf limitations.
what_we_build_desc: From simple internal tools to complete SaaS platforms.
cta_title: Have an idea for an app?
cta_description: Describe what you want to build — even if you're not sure exactly what you need. We'll help you define it.

app_types.title: Admin Dashboards
app_types.description: Custom back-office tools for business management. Data visualization, reports, user management.

app_types.title: Booking Systems
app_types.description: Online appointment, venue or resource booking. Real-time availability, email notifications, payment integration.

app_types.title: SaaS Platforms
app_types.description: Multi-tenant applications with subscription billing, user roles and custom workflows.

app_types.title: Data Platforms
app_types.description: Applications for collecting, processing and visualizing data in real time.

app_types.title: API & Integrations
app_types.description: Connecting systems, webhooks, third-party APIs. Automating data flows between tools.

app_types.title: Custom Tools
app_types.description: Anything else your business needs that doesn't exist in off-the-shelf software.

seo.title: Custom Web Applications | SaaS Platforms | Web Apps | adinfinity
